TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Likau-uan = Gaga mniq Taytung Haytwansyang ka alang Likau-uan. 103 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 443 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 419 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 24 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 82%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 1%, ni rahuq na o 7%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = likau-uan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ħajtwansjaŋ ka alaŋ likau-uan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, tajal *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Likau-uan = Gaga mniq Taytung Haytwansyang ka alang Likau-uan. 103 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 443 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 419 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 24 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 82%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 1%, Tayal 1%, ni rahuq na o 7%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = likau-uan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ħajtwansjaŋ ka alaŋ likau-uan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, tajal *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
